text:
Hange Zoë Attack on Titan Character Encyclopedia — As this character is not given any name or alias by any official source, this wiki uses the English translation of the name given to their manga counterpart for purposes of identification. is a member of the Survey Corps.

Appearance

Hange has shoulder length dark brown hair in an unkempt high ponytail with bangs parted down the middle and glasses.

Story

In an expedition beyond Wall Rose, the Survey Corps retreats from a horde of Titans as the rainfall begins to obscure their vision. Hange suggests it will pass, but Commander Erwin Smith chooses to scrap the mission. He orders a flare to be fired, but Hange spots a black flare fired from Taki's squad. Attack on Titan Anthology: Story 5
